_comment: ECS Fargate Task Definition for Cybersec Agentic AI
_steps: Step 1: Set family name, task role ARN, execution role ARN
Step 3: Set CPU and memory (e.g. 1024 CPU / 2048 MB for API container)
Step 4: Define containerDefinitions for FastAPI app
Step 5: Set image URI from ECR (e.g. <account>.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/cybersec-api:latest)
Step 7: Inject env vars from AWS Secrets Manager / Parameter Store
Step 8: Configure CloudWatch log group for container logs
Step 9: Set healthCheck command: curl -f http://localhost:8000/health
